name: SA Sample - Bulk Processor
brief: Sample: scheduled background AI processing for Business Central via Job Queue.
description: A Job Queue–runnable codeunit walks a filtered Customer set, asks a Smart Agent one question per record, and writes each AI answer to a results table for human review. The canonical pattern for batch AI workloads in D365 BC — drafting collection emails overnight, summarising changes, classifying records, and similar bulk-LLM scenarios.
